reviews.title: From initial purchase to delivery excellent\u2026
reviews.body: From initial purchase to delivery everything went as planned. Received the call first thing on the morning of the booked delivery date to advise when Dave A and Paul Y would arrive and they did, on time. Very happy guys who did a great job and made sure everything was put together well. Cleared away all the packaging, so no mess.  They were a pleasure to have in the house, and I\u2019m very happy

reviews.title: Ease of buying online from a trusted\u2026
reviews.body: Ease of buying online from a trusted and reputable company, quick and easy delivery confirmation followed by seemless delivery: Stefan and Richard were prompt polite and professional - what more could you ask for.  All round great experience!

reviews.title: Had a table delivered
reviews.body: Had a table, bench and chairs delivery today. Gary R & Jordan were on time, polite and efficient. No complaints

reviews.title: Fast delivery and friendly staff
reviews.body: Fast delivery great product. Liam and Wojciech delivered the item, were super friendly and built the furniture in no time. Great lads. 5 star service.

reviews.title: Bad quality, chairs falling after within a few months!
reviews.body: I\u2019m so upset with my 8 \u2018Quebec\u2019 dining chairs I bought only 8 months ago! They\u2019re all falling apart, bad quality stitching!  Dining chairs are supposed to last many years! The ones I had before looked new after 10 years!! I wish I can attach photos to show the quality.  All the company did was offer me an option to buy a new one for 50% off! Why would I want the same chair if i

reviews.title: Paul S and Tapiwa what type
reviews.body: Paul S and Tapiwa what type? Absolutely amazing. Lovely attitude very helpful and even helped us because the peace arrived damaged. And they told us exactly what steps to take and what to do next. Absolute perfection!

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.body: Delivery guys Jake and Marty did a great job, couldn\u2019t be happier with the delivery process. Very happy with the furniture, great quality and looks amazing.

reviews.title: Received dining  tables and chairs just\u2026
reviews.body: Received dining  tables and chairs just now  delivery guys Liam snd Wojciech great.  Pleasant and helpful. However the leather chairs are poorly scratched and require replacing.

reviews.title: What else can I buy from Barker and Stonehouse
reviews.body: Easy to order. Kept up to date with delivery time and date. Morning of the delivery got my call. Thirty minutes later my table was here. Paul S and Tapiwa quickly put the table together. Both were very pleasant. They took away the packaging.  I'm now looking to see what other furniture I can buy from Barker and Stonehouse. Would definitely recommend.

reviews.title: Stefan and Richard were very\u2026
reviews.body: Stefan and Richard were very professional and done the job quickly but efficiently. Thank you for being very chatty and kind

reviews.title: Tom H and Craig did a great job today
reviews.body: Tom H and Craig did a great job today. Delivery was on time as scheduled and a courtesy call was made 30mins beforehand. Polite guys and took extra care when delivering our sofas also ensuring they were positioned correctly before leaving.  Working in 30+ degrees too. Thank you.

reviews.title: Fantastic Experience
reviews.body: Whole process with Barker and Stonehouse was great - good selection of classy furniture. Staff in the Leeds branch were helpful but not pushy, we had Guy and Chrissie helping us. Managed to get a couple of sofas on clearance so we only waited 10 days for delivery but this was booked and arranged promptly. Liam and Wojciech were fantastic for delivery - in and out in 20 minutes!

reviews.title: First class experience shopping at the\u2026
reviews.body: First class experience shopping at the Battersea branch. John Bushill could not have been more helpful in advising us on our new sofa and dining table. He has a great sense of humour and we couldn't have asked for better service. If you\u2019re thinking  of visiting the store, ask for John.

reviews.title: Adrian and Quorasih delivered &\u2026
reviews.body: Adrian and Quorasih delivered & assembled our two sofas today. They were quick, efficient, friendly and polite. We were informed of a 2 hour slot a few days before and then another notification 20 mins before they arrived which helps if you\u2019re working from home.

reviews.title: Adrian and Quorasih delivered &\u2026
reviews.body: Adrian and Quorasih delivered & assembled our two sofas today. They were quick, efficient, friendly and polite. We were informed of a 2 hour slot a few days before and then another notification 20 mins before they arrived which helps if you\u2019re working from home.

reviews.title: First Class Service
reviews.body: Dan and Levi delivered our sofas today.  They gave excellent service, assembling the sofas, applying felt pads to the feet to protect our Amtico flooring, placed the sofas just where we wanted and they removed all of the packaging.    This followed up on the first class advice and product knowledge provided by John Bushill at the Barker & Stonehouse store.  He guided us through the sales process w

reviews.title: Very beautiful and elegant furniture
reviews.body: Very beautiful and elegant furniture. My place and my taste. Really kind and knowledgeable team. A special thank you to Valantina for her patience, kindness and knowledge and completing the order xxx

reviews.title: Adrian and Quorasih delivered &\u2026
reviews.body: Adrian and Quorasih delivered & assembled our two sofas today. They were quick, efficient, friendly and polite. We were informed of a 2 hour slot a few days before and then another notification 20 mins before they arrived which helps if you\u2019re working from home.

reviews.title: First Class Service
reviews.body: Dan and Levi delivered our sofas today.  They gave excellent service, assembling the sofas, applying felt pads to the feet to protect our Amtico flooring, placed the sofas just where we wanted and they removed all of the packaging.    This followed up on the first class advice and product knowledge provided by John Bushill at the Barker & Stonehouse store.  He guided us through the sales process w

reviews.title: Bought a sofa in Knaresborough store
reviews.body: Bought a sofa in Knaresborough store. Good quality, very happy with the purchase. Helpful staff- Sharon S and Jamie H

reviews.title: George and Meg in the Bath Store are amazing!
reviews.body: George and Meg in the Bath Located Store have been outstanding! I have a trade account activated recently but couldn't find the light fitting online was directed to the Bath Store who literally have gone over and above to help and restored my faith back into Heals after a not so reliable start with another team.  George and Meg I hope Heals give you a raise as you deserve it, what a shame the rest

reviews.title: Excellent Service
reviews.body: Great help from the store when I couldn\u2019t get an order in online!  Excellent customer service Darren \u2026

reviews.title: Overall an effortless and pleasant experience
reviews.body: Easy to navigate website, good offers in well known and established brands, excellent customer service.

reviews.title: Great customer service
reviews.body: Great customer service, feels very personal and tailored to the needs of customer rather than generic!

reviews.title: Great first order
reviews.body: First time I have ordered and I found site easy to navigate.  Items well illustrated and and I was able to place order quickly.  Free delivery a bonus

reviews.title: Excellent and prompt and friendly\u2026
reviews.body: Excellent and prompt and friendly service. Exactly what I would expect from a great historic company.

reviews.title: Outstanding Service
reviews.body: We made two visits to Heal's. We received outstanding service, advice and patience from Matt Fowler over both days. He gave up his lunchtime for us and answered all of our questions with real information and grace. All of this in the Heal's environment which makes choosing and buying things for our home such a delight. Thanks to Matt, especially, and to everyone.

reviews.title: What a truly awful company
reviews.body: What a truly awful company. I bought a Brunel sofa a few years ago which was supposed to be guaranteed for life. One of the legs bent with only light usage, and I asked for a replacement. I was told that the legs were not covered in the warranty and that I could not get a replacement leg, even if I paid for it, as the manufacturer no longer makes them. Then I went into one of their stores and saw

reviews.title: AVOID this store
reviews.body: Awful experience -having bought 4 lights from here, I bought another 4 for other areas. 1 was clearance and the other 3 were at full price,  Not in stock Delivery 4-5 April. On 22/04 I chased them to be told they have the stock ( for 3 weeks ) but they didn't have the clearance light and I would have to re order at full price dueto their MISTAKE. After 2 days they offered me10% off this light only

reviews.title: Don\u2019t do it
reviews.body: Ordered 2 x Normann marble shelves on 5th January, quoted 6-8 weeks. Have been told \u201csorry it\u2019s more like 16 weeks\u201d.   So, 4 months wait.   Clearly they forgot to lodge the order with the supplier.   Truly shocking lack of service, no care, no response.  Am still waiting

reviews.title: George and Meg in the Bath Store are amazing!
reviews.body: George and Meg in the Bath Located Store have been outstanding! I have a trade account activated recently but couldn't find the light fitting online was directed to the Bath Store who literally have gone over and above to help and restored my faith back into Heals after a not so reliable start with another team.  George and Meg I hope Heals give you a raise as you deserve it, what a shame the rest

reviews.title: AVOID this store - no customer service
reviews.body: Having ordered some Umage lights which are fantastic fro Heals, I ordered 4 more - 1 was in stock and on sale and I paid full price for the other 3. After contacting them a few weeks past the delivery date - they asked if I wanted part shipment while they are still waiting for 1 more. The were NOT being helpful - I found out that they had sold the sale light to someone else. Didn't bother telling

reviews.title: Happy with Heal's
reviews.body: I have bought many items from Heal's for my house in the past year, ranging from a table, 2x sofas, a shelving unit, lamp, stool... Whilst there was a minor issue with 2 of them, a technician visited very quickly and with the minimum of fuss, everything was sorted very satisfactorily. My house now looks fabulous, with so many beautiful items. At no other shop have I come across such lovely furnitu

reviews.title: What a surprise
reviews.body: What a surprise.  We thought that Heals was an upmarket quality brand. Absolute shambles, products never arrived - initially said they had, but later confirmed still at the Kingston Store.  Impossible, to obtain a response, emails ignored. Postscript- we did eventually receive a reply and refund for the goods that had not arrived. So we have updated the review.

reviews.title: Outstanding Service
reviews.body: We made two visits to Heal's. We received outstanding service, advice and patience from Matt Fowler over both days. He gave up his lunchtime for us and answered all of our questions with real information and grace. All of this in the Heal's environment which makes choosing and buying things for our home such a delight. Thanks to Matt, especially, and to everyone.

reviews.title: Picture Perfect  I ordered a framed print which arrived\u2026
reviews.body: I ordered a framed print which arrived safely but unfortunately did not contain the promised hanging kit.  I emailed the Customer Services and received a reply from Rachel the same day apologising and promising to liaise with the suppliers for a hanging kit to  be sent to my address.  King & McGaw sent my kit first class and I am one very happy customer.  Great service Heal\u2019s!

reviews.title: I made several purchases from Heal\u2019s a\u2026
reviews.body: I made several purchases from Heal\u2019s a number of years ago and have been very happy with the products (bedroom furniture and lighting). I had a recent issue with one item and requested some replacement parts, which the Heal\u2019s team (Izzie) managed to sort very quickly without any hassle. Great customer service, really impressed.

reviews.title: Picture Perfect  I ordered a framed print which arrived\u2026
reviews.body: I ordered a framed print which arrived safely but unfortunately did not contain the promised hanging kit.  I emailed the Customer Services and received a reply from Rachel the same day apologising and promising to liaise with the suppliers for a hanging kit to  be sent to my address.  King & McGaw sent my kit first class and I am one very happy customer.  Great service Heal\u2019s!

reviews.title: Terrible customer service
reviews.body: Terrible customer service. Placed an order for some very expensive battery operated candles that after 8 weeks are gummy, nicked and discoloured. Emailed Heals and they are trying to palm the issue off on me and refusing a refund. Avoid and take your money elsewhere!!

reviews.title: Picture Perfect  I ordered a framed print which arrived\u2026
reviews.body: I ordered a framed print which arrived safely but unfortunately did not contain the promised hanging kit.  I emailed the Customer Services and received a reply from Rachel the same day apologising and promising to liaise with the suppliers for a hanging kit to  be sent to my address.  King & McGaw sent my kit first class and I am one very happy customer.  Great service Heal\u2019s!

reviews.title: Lovely environment and excellent\u2026
reviews.body: Lovely environment and excellent service as usual - many thanks!

reviews.title: Excellent service
reviews.body: From the sales consultant Alex in store, to the two guys, Will and Lewis who delivered the furniture, they were all friendly, helpful, informative and a credit to the company. I would certainly recommend Lee Longlands for their furniture, and also for their excellent customer service.

reviews.title: Helpful and professional from start to finish
reviews.body: Helpful and professional from start to finish, from Mandy in the Leamington showroom to Jay, Carl and James on delivery. Excellent communication and we love our new sofa!

reviews.title: Super service!
reviews.body: Just taken delivery of our recliner chair. Superb quality product. Service in store was great. Had decided we would collect the product, to save cost, and then had a call to say they would deliver it anyway, for free!  Contacted us   just prior to delivery date. We had to rearrange due to being on holiday and they were most accommodating finding an alternative date.  The two delivery guys. Jay and

reviews.title: Tony & Kane, Best delivery team.
reviews.body: Alibaba was great in the Pboro branch, but the bonus was the delivery team, Tony & Kane. Nothing was too much trouble. Buy with confidence

reviews.title: Wonderful products
reviews.body: Wonderful products, fantastic staff and service. The shop manager even called me in the evening to confirm the details of my order, because I made a slight change to the upholstery last minute and he wanted to double check. Very happy

reviews.title: Lee Longlands  - lives up to our experience again
reviews.body: We have a history of ordering from Lee Longlands going back many years and their products are always of a high quality.  On this occasion, our item of furniture was delivered by Lewis and Kane who took great care in locating the item to our satisfaction and taking every piece of rubbish with them. You can be proud of your Staff. We have emailed our comments as well to Customer Service.

reviews.title: Fabulous Service, Beautiful Goods
reviews.body: Lee and Nathan did a sterling job of delivering and assembling our sofa set, cuddler and dining room table and chairs. They were polite, efficient and tidy, despite it being an impossibly hot day (over 30 degrees celsius!) Highly recommend Lee Longlands as the quality is superb.

reviews.title: An efficient and friendly service.
reviews.body: An efficient and friendly service. Kane and Jay phoned to confirm delivery time and they duly delivered the chair on time which they unpacked and assembled. They were courteous and quick.

reviews.title: Lee Longlands staff at the Bristol\u2026
reviews.body: Lee Longlands staff at the Bristol store are nothing short of amazing! James the Manager, helped me resolve a situation with an order I placed, when it was most needed, following a life changing set of circumstances almost immediately after placing the order. 12 months later, I went back to see James and I\u2019m now in possession of not only a beautiful chair, but comfort that\u2019s needed more

reviews.title: Super service!
reviews.body: Just taken delivery of our recliner chair. Superb quality product. Service in store was great. Had decided we would collect the product, to save cost, and then had a call to say they would deliver it anyway, for free!  Contacted us   just prior to delivery date. We had to rearrange due to being on holiday and they were most accommodating finding an alternative date.  The two delivery guys. Jay and

reviews.title: The whole experience from choosing my\u2026
reviews.body: The whole experience from choosing my suite to delivery has been excellent. Brian Bowman at the Bristol shop was very helpful with our choice of furniture.  Mark, Lewis &Tom who delivered my furniture did an excellent job. They were very polite & respectful of my property & made sure everything was in working order. 10/10.  Would certainly recommend this company.  Thank you

reviews.title: Elevating the every day
reviews.body: Having shopped many times at Lee Longlands over several years, I returned when shopping for new furniture. Excellent help from Roman to order furniture for my living room. No pressure to buy, just practical advice. Also thank you to Paul, who advised me in Roman's absence. Great service, furniture is high quality and different to most stores, helpful staff. I definitely recommend.

reviews.title: Nathan & Rob were excellent
reviews.body: Nathan & Rob were excellent. We\u2019re very efficient, Explaining everything before they left.   Mandy was a great sales person in Leamington Spa. Overall v happy so far.

reviews.title: We have bought a suite from Lee\u2026
reviews.body: We have bought a suite from Lee Longlands in Bristol. We were helped by James Lane and found his advice extremely useful as he guided us through the extensive choice and we found a suite that works for both of us ( 6'2 and 5'3) We were able to choose a delivery day that fitted in with us and the delivery people, Lewis and Tony did everything for us, checked that the electric reclining functions wo

reviews.title: Great delivery
reviews.body: The 2 delivery guys Jay and Frank were great, no problem getting the furniture in to our property and then disposing of the packaging for us. The only problem was after they had left we noticed the storage foot stool was a different shade of blue to the sofa, so a bit disappointing.

reviews.title: It was great to have a physical store\u2026
reviews.body: It was great to have a physical store with an extensive range of dining tables to explore. Sales man was old skool but not in a pushy way. Delivery time was about 9 weeks which is too long, but this always seems to be the way with big furniture.  Kane and Carl delivered smoothly,  and Kane was particularly helpful and positive whilst putting things together. Overall a very good experience

reviews.title: Great delivery
reviews.body: The 2 delivery guys Jay and Frank were great, no problem getting the furniture in to our property and then disposing of the packaging for us. The only problem was after they had left we noticed the storage foot stool was a different shade of blue to the sofa, so a bit disappointing.

reviews.title: Delivery & customer complaint services
reviews.body: Kane & Frank provided a polite, respectful & efficient delivery service.  However it was disappointing that the glass coffee table was not perfect. The glass was imperfect & had a blurred surface.  Customer services were good & efficient but I\u2019m awaiting a response regarding a replacement table.   I hope that a replacement will soon be available?\ud83e\udd1e

reviews.title: Fabulous customer service!
reviews.body: Yet another great service from Jake in Leamington to enable us to purchase a new Ercol sofa and snuggler.  Love supporting a family business and the personal touches make a real difference!

reviews.title: Quality furniture and quality service
reviews.body: I ordered a garden patio set and when unpacking we noticed a small mark on one of the cushions. I took a photo and sent an email to Cox and Cox saying I was very happy with the furniture but disappointed with the mark on it. I had a very prompt reply from Farad who swiftly dealt with the matter to my satisfaction. I wouldn\u2019t hesitate to buy further items from Cox and Cox as they are of good q

reviews.title: Where are the Customer Service team?
reviews.body: I have placed an order yesterday for next day delivery (prior to the 12 noon cutoff), it\u2019s now nearly 3pm on the delivery day, I\u2019ve received no tracking or dispatch email, I\u2019ve tried to online chat them (switched off), called - waited on hold for 10 mins to then go to an answer machine, tried social media messaging (left unread) and emailed them - could be upto 5 days for a reply. T

reviews.title: Beautiful blue linen cushion cover
reviews.body: The linen cushion cover is a beautiful shade of blue, high quality material and well-finished - highly recommended.  I\u2019ve knocked off one star as no tracking number was provided, so I wasn\u2019t sure when to expect the delivery. Zoya in Customer Service was very helpful in resolving the matter, and the package turned up soon after I was supplied with a tracking number.

reviews.title: Lovely customer service from Zoya
reviews.body: Lovely customer service from Zoya, who stepped in quickly and helped resolve my issue, i would definitely recommend Cox & Cox for interesting, quality products and great customer service. Thanks Zoya

reviews.title: Dreadful customer service!!
reviews.body: I wouldn\u2019t even give them one star if zero was an option! They have beautiful things but when things go wrong their customer service is dreadful!! I\u2019ve been waiting nearly two months for a side table I ordered as they sent the wrong item! Since then it\u2019s been ME doing ALL of the chasing and they never get my emails I keep being asked to send and then they don\u2019t follow up! And i

reviews.title: Rapid solution and response
reviews.body: Rapid solution to my problem thanks to Laiba. Question acknowledged by return and problem resolved in 24 hours

reviews.title: I made a mistake when ordering but Zoya\u2026
reviews.body: I made a mistake when ordering but Zoya was absolutely superb at sorting out for me. This is in direct comparison with services from a competitor of Cox & Cox so I 100% know who I will and won't be using going forward.

reviews.title: Getting desperate
reviews.body: I'm writing a repeat review as it seems the only way to get any response. Kelly and Ashley both phoned me last time and gave great news about a direct phone number and \u00a3100 compensation for poor service but neither has materialised.   I paid \u00a31500 for garden furniture which arrived on 22 April minus 2 cushions. I have a verbal agreement that the cushions will be delivered on 3 June. Plea

reviews.title: Order Correction
reviews.body: I realised quite quickly after I placed my order and got the confirmation that I ordered the wrong colour! Fahad was very helpful and confirmed with me which colour I actually wanted and was able to change my order with no hassle and efficiently. Thank you very much.

reviews.title: Cox and Cox have gorgeous products at a\u2026
reviews.body: Cox and Cox have gorgeous products at a reasonable price combined with excellent customer service. I had ordered a garden bench that was due in stock in May. When I contacted Fahad in customer services he quickly advised the product would not be available until June and then suggested a number of alternatives. Extremely friendly, helpful and very responsive.

reviews.title: Very Impressed with customer service and logistics
reviews.body: Qaiser has been a great help with placing an order for a parasol & granite base.  His emails are very precise and very quickly too !  Also impressed with logistics team (Eddie) has been so lovely arranging delivery . Also, the notification for 'back in stock' worked brilliantly. Happy to recommend Cox & Cox

reviews.title: Firstly I paid for next day delivery\u2026
reviews.body: Firstly I paid for next day delivery and the order showed up two days late , this was a wedding gift so really inconvenient. I was given the delivery charge back but was made to feel like they were doing me a huge favour. Then a return request was done which according to them takes 48hrs and its been 4 days so far!! Seriously how can it take 4 days to give a customer your return address!! First an

reviews.title: Great ending!
reviews.body: Ironically, the experience started off good, went badly but ended really well with a confirmed order. Qaiser was able to assist us in having a happy outcome which I was very grateful for. Looking forward to receiving my new sofa!

reviews.title: Order Correction
reviews.body: I realised quite quickly after I placed my order and got the confirmation that I ordered the wrong colour! Fahad was very helpful and confirmed with me which colour I actually wanted and was able to change my order with no hassle and efficiently. Thank you very much.

reviews.title: Contacting customer services at Cox and Cox.
reviews.body: My problem was dealt with extremely curtiously  I forgot to include a code for my purchase and Zoya from customer service was so helpful in solving the matter. I love Cox and cox cushions and would recommend their company.

reviews.title: I wrote a post a week ago about my\u2026
reviews.body: I wrote a post a week ago about my order not being processed. I was given lots of AI platitudes and promise to pay my money back , that was last week, despite my payment disappearing into their banking system within seconds! So a new tactic has started, emailimg me and asking me for 'the details' ive tried to ask what further they need. They have my order number, thryve quoted it, they have my ema

reviews.title: I am a returning customer of Cox and\u2026
reviews.body: I am a returning customer of Cox and Cox, the quality of their merchandise is second to none.  Everything I have purchased is always amazing and never disappoints.  I purchased a bedspread but there was quite a delay on delivery \u2026 I reached out to C&C and received a quick response from Laiba \u2026 I explained the circumstances and she agreed to chase the supplier \u2026 I was constantly kept

reviews.title: Order Correction
reviews.body: I realised quite quickly after I placed my order and got the confirmation that I ordered the wrong colour! Fahad was very helpful and confirmed with me which colour I actually wanted and was able to change my order with no hassle and efficiently. Thank you very much.

reviews.title: Terrible experience (this time)
reviews.body: Terrible experience (this time), goods faulty and simply brushed off with a - they will deteriorate over time (I\u2019ve had them 6 weeks !).  No offer to change or refund, or to investigate further even when photos were shared   Reference number is 002465027

reviews.title: Contacting customer services at Cox and Cox.
reviews.body: My problem was dealt with extremely curtiously  I forgot to include a code for my purchase and Zoya from customer service was so helpful in solving the matter. I love Cox and cox cushions and would recommend their company.

reviews.title: Great value and quality bed and\u2026
reviews.body: Great value and quality bed and mattress, we researched and you can\u2019t best Dusk on beds. Easy to assemble too, all done in an hour.

reviews.title: Do not purchase the Ascot Ottoman Storage Bed!
reviews.body: Please read this review and do not buy the  Ascot Ottoman Storage Bed! This bed is faulty, I had the bed for 3 months before the bar in the middle collapsed. I contacted dusk and they sent the replacement part, however due to poor quality of items it was hard to actually repair. The staff on the phone were friendly but it took too long to sort out and made the whole experience stressful. I had to

reviews.title: Chairs are beautiful and look amusing\u2026
reviews.body: Chairs are beautiful and look amusing with my table

reviews.title: Lana Side Table - Poor Quality
reviews.body: The side table is not as shown in the photos.  There are stickers that cover the cam locks which have seemingly been airbrushed out in the photos on their webpage!  It looks cheap in the flesh.  A real shame as dowels and some wood glue would have led to a far better finish and done the job just as well.

reviews.title: Poor quality
reviews.body: The bed was satisfactory on arrival, however after around a year it began to weaken and required repeated repairs, including reattaching screws. After 27 months, the bed became completely unusable and had to be disposed of. The wood appeared too soft to hold the screws securely, and several screws snapped over time, suggesting poor-quality materials. I contacted customer service, but as the produc

reviews.title: Dusk
reviews.body: Dusk, were brilliant, from the first my first order, good communication through emails and texts, delivered when advised and the quality I was extremely happy with!

reviews.title: Great product great price and quick\u2026
reviews.body: Great product great price and quick delivery ( 2 tog Superking duvet )

reviews.title: When my son had an issue with the table\u2026
reviews.body: When my son had an issue with the table I ordered for him. Customer service were very helpful and understanding and arranged for a replacement item and removal of faulty item. They were so helpful, professional and supportive. Excellent customer service.

reviews.title: Top quality product \ud83d\udc4d
reviews.body: Top quality product \ud83d\udc4d

reviews.title: Hi it wasn't your company I was annoyed\u2026
reviews.body: Hi it wasn't your company I was annoyed with it was the delivery driver he didn't ring my bell he just put the parcel in the dustbin wasn't  happy with that.

reviews.title: great quality but poor service when parts missing
reviews.body: Ordered the Rachel sideboards which are beautiful but BOTH had the same piece missing, and one had the holes drilled in the wrong side so both are unusable as unable to be fully put together. Am STILL awaiting an update on whether they can source the part or send a new one two weeks later. Incredibly frustrating and radio silence from Dusk.

reviews.title: Both items arrived damaged!
reviews.body: Both 2 seater and pouffe arrived damaged. Tear in fabric on sofa, scratched/damaged legs and ripped material under pouffe hanging down. Offered \u00a375 refund to keep both items. Wanted to exchange but have to wait another 6 weeks for delivery!

reviews.title: The only reason for 4 stars is there\u2026
reviews.body: The only reason for 4 stars is there was a small scratch on a drawer top, but Dusk sorted immediately, swift response to email. Both ordering & sorting delivery was a breeze. Delivery was on time - great service from BJS - and quality of furniture looks good - yet to be assembled. Will use Dusk again.

reviews.title: I have medium-level experience
reviews.body: You provided contradictory information, and in some cases no information at all.  Additionally, I received a text message about the delivery slot, but the delivery team called me a few hours earlier saying they were already coming and wanted to leave the furniture in my garden.  I still haven\u2019t opened the boxes yet, so I cannot confirm whether there is any damage.  The only positive thing was

reviews.title: Delivered to my old address
reviews.body: Delivered to my old address  Re delivered to my new address wrong time given on email stayed in all day  When arrived box open mentioned it to your delivery guy told it was ok it had been in the van All day tied up . When my diy man came next day no fixtures at all . Very expensive and disappointing  Also so hard to get hold of you when I did get through your staff were very helpful .  Seriously n

reviews.body: You provided contradictory information, and in some cases no information at all.  Additionally, I received a text message about the delivery slot, but the delivery team called me a few hours earlier saying they were already coming and wanted to leave the furniture in my garden.  I still haven\u2019t opened the boxes yet, so I cannot confirm whether there is any damage.  The only positive thing was

reviews.title: I love shopping with Dusk
reviews.body: I love shopping with Dusk. The quality is excellent and the communication once you place an order means that you are well informed and updated at every stage. Products are well packaged ensuring that they are protected in transit and arrive in perfect condition. The mirror is even better than expected. Love it.

reviews.title: Perfect!
reviews.body: Beautiful furniture, very sturdy that I can tell will last. Easy to assemble on your own and very reasonably priced compared to other places that have the same furniture. Took longer than I thought to get here but that\u2019s an observation, not a complaint, it\u2019s perfect for the space I wanted it for and that\u2019s the main thing. Very happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: The furniture is lovely - delivery a let downn
reviews.body: The furniture is lovely. Let down by delivery company. Van scheduled, but arrived without the goods. Two more calls to arrange re-delivery.  Courier line busy as they have so many issues.

reviews.title: Perfect!
reviews.body: Beautiful furniture, very sturdy that I can tell will last. Easy to assemble on your own and very reasonably priced compared to other places that have the same furniture. Took longer than I thought to get here but that\u2019s an observation, not a complaint, it\u2019s perfect for the space I wanted it for and that\u2019s the main thing. Very happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: Steve p and Ben a come and put our bed\u2026
reviews.body: Steve p and Ben a come and put our bed up this morning. Very nice guys done it super fast and was very professional

reviews.title: Steve and Ben were brilliant!
reviews.body: Steve snd Ben were brilliant! Prompt to confirmed time, polite, took their shoes off at the door and installed the bed effortlessly! So impressed, thank you very much!

reviews.title: Quick service
reviews.body: I found the bed online, I rung out the get the measurements to ensure it will fit got, got all my answers and ordered straight away.

reviews.title: Very  efficient service
reviews.body: Very  efficient service

reviews.title: Excellent service from Kiran
reviews.body: Kiran was extremely helpful today, he dealt with my query efficiently and explained he was going away to read the notes and gather detail, which I respected. Kiran also followed up with an email as promised. We still do not have a resolution for our broken sofa, but hopefully this will be followed up as Kiran promised, I believe he has done everything within his capacity.

reviews.title: My coustomer service agent Frances,was totally professional and the service was excellent.
reviews.body: My coustomer service agent Frances,was of great assistance.From start to finish.Made the purchase of my item look so easy.

reviews.title: They have done a very good job
reviews.body: They have done a very good job, happy with their service. Well done Guyz.

reviews.title: Excellent delivery service
reviews.body: Rob and Joe did both of our deliveries ( an adjustable bed and a corner sofa) and I could not fault the service which they gave. Both times they were extremely careful when assembling the furniture and I would highly recommend them.

reviews.title: Lola at Furniture Village was fantastic
reviews.body: Lola at Furniture Village was absoloutely Brillaint. She resolved my query that was dragging on for 2 weeks and made sure my concerns around my damage rug was seen too and ensured the replacement rug was ordered and delivered to me within the week. Thank you so much Lola!!!!

reviews.title: Qasim was great and really helpful and\u2026
reviews.body: Qasim was great and really helpful and built the bed in perfectly, amazing delivery service

reviews.title: Would definitely use FV again, delivery guys were great
reviews.body: Sofa was delayed a couple of weeks but there was always good communication regarding this. Delivered today and the guys Steve P & Ben A were lovely. Very respectful, took shoes off upon entering the home every time despite having multiple trips back to the van. Put the sofa together within 5/10 minutes, made sure I was happy before they left and even demonstrated how the remote control worked. Rea

reviews.title: Sofa
reviews.body: Helpful sales people helped us choose right sofa Easy ordering  Phoned when ready and easy to arrange delivery On delivery day time given and drivers rang on way and arrived in between time slot given. Very efficient and professional when bringing sofa in. The delivery drivers were David and Geoff All in all a very pleasant experience  Looking forward to enjoying sofa

reviews.title: A really good Experience
reviews.body: Anja made the whole furniture village experience go really well. She was very knowledgable on all of the items and gave her professional opinion when asked. She demonstrated a wide range of table designs which helped us secure our table and chairs she even followed up by informing us of the product availability. A really good experience.

reviews.title: Friendly, Helpful Staff and Smooth Delivery
reviews.body: Barry at Furniture Village was very helpful in showing us the styles and sizes of table and chairs we were after. We had our small children with us, and he was great with them too, which made the whole experience much easier and more enjoyable.  Very polite and friendly delivery men, Danny and Charlie, quick service, and they cleared away all the packaging afterwards. Really pleased with the exper

reviews.title: Furniture delivery
reviews.body: Our table and chairs were delivered today within the timeframe notified to us previously. The driver rang beforehand to inform me when they were half an hour away so we were fully prepared for them.  The table was in flat pack form but the drivers assembled it for us which was a pleasant surprise as normally the customer has to do this themselves.  The drivers were polite and friendly and smartly

reviews.title: Modern well laid-out showroom with\u2026
reviews.body: Modern well laid-out showroom with excellent car parking, great advice and help from Sales Consultant Cindy who let us take samples home to match up our decor. Went back a few days later and made our purchase and now awaiting delivery  in about five weeks.

reviews.title: Excellent service from Sebastian and Mike
reviews.body: The two chaps who delivered my furniture Sebastian and Mike were brilliant. They had a can do approach in getting some very large and heavy furniture up to my apartment.  Very friendly guys.  They very professionally and quickly assembled and set out the furniture, removed all the packaging materials and left no mess.  Thank you for the great work!

reviews.title: Just had our sofa delivered
reviews.body: Just had our sofa delivered by Danny and Charlie. They were excellent. Friendly, careful and professional. Ensured no damage to our property bringing the item into our house and put it together quickly. Very good service.

reviews.title: Review for table chairs stools sofa bed
reviews.body: In the shop in reading my experience was 10/10. After we dealt turned in to a nightmare. Ordered 4jan 26, for delivery 1st week April. We received delivery today 22nd may, 3 chairs with minor faults, sofa bed inoperable, 2 stools minor defects, table stained and different colour to what was in the shop. The delivery people were clueless had no tools to put goods together, and didn\u2019t know how
